summary: The world’s biggest powers are shoveling a 13-digit pile of cash into winning the next global arms race. But they’re not buying nukes — they’re hoping to master AI, hypersonics, drones and military satellites.

title_cn: 乌克兰搜查摩纳哥轰炸机，发现尸体并进入酷刑室

title_cn: Choppin' It Up：Fooda 首席执行官谈其轻资产餐饮服务模式
summary: Employers are increasingly paying for more and more food to boost recruitment, productivity, retention and “earn the commute” of their workers, Fooda Founder and CEO Orazio Buzza tells Bloomberg Intelligence. In this episode of the Choppin’ It Up podcast, Buzza sits down with BI’s senior restaurant and foodservice analyst Michael Halen to discuss the foodservice company’s unique, asset-light business model. He also comments on workplace attendance trends, catering growth and the benefits of owni

summary: Logistics companies face growing pressure to reduce emissions while keeping global supply chains moving. In this Talking Transports podcast, DHL Group Executive Vice President of Corporate Development Yin Zou joins Bloomberg Intelligence’s senior transportation and logistics analyst Lee Klaskow to discuss how sustainability, clean operations and technology support DHL’s 2030 strategy. Zou explains why sustainable aviation fuel is key to decarbonization, with aviation generating about 70% of the

title: Why Hedge Funds Posted Such a Strong First Half
title_cn: 为什么对冲基金上半年表现如此强劲
summary: Hedge funds posted a strong first half with Lone Pine Capital posting a 43% gain and David Tepper’s Appaloosa Management returning 32%. Sridhar Natarajan has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Midtown Manhattan Buildings Evacuated After Collapse Warning
title_cn: 曼哈顿中城建筑物倒塌警告后疏散
summary: Construction crews were pulled from a 37-story Midtown Manhattan building Tuesday morning after bricks were reported falling from the 21st floor, emergency officials said, prompting building evacuations and street closures. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BNP Names Jain Global’s Gupta as Head of FICC Trading Americas
title_cn: 法国巴黎银行任命 Jain Global 的 Gupta 为美洲 FICC 交易主管
summary: BNP Paribas SA has appointed Kavi Gupta — previously at multistrategy hedge fund Jain Global — as head of fixed income, currencies and commodities trading across the Americas.

title_cn: SK海力士美国上市据称获得数倍超额认购
summary: SK Hynix Inc.’s $28 billion US listing is multiple times oversubscribed ahead of pricing on Thursday, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Brazil Treasury Has Patience and Cash to Ease Local Bond Stress
title_cn: 巴西财政部有耐心和现金来缓解当地债券压力
summary: Brazil’s Treasury is ready to step up actions to alleviate stress in the nation’s 2.3-trillion-real ($447 billion) inflation-linked bond market that has been hit by shifting demand and investors’ concerns about public spending.

title: BlackRock's Bold AI Credit Call
title_cn: 贝莱德大胆的人工智能信贷呼吁
summary: BlackRock Investment Institute Global Head Jean Boivin joined Open Interest to talk about how AI is fueling the biggest investment transformation in history, making private credit one of the biggest long-term beneficiaries. He explains why investors don't need to pick AI winners to profit, why balance sheet quality matters more than ever, and why comparisons to the dot-com bubble or 2008 miss what's happening today. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Some Investors Rethink SpaceX Exposure
title_cn: 一些投资者重新考虑 SpaceX 的风险投资
summary: As SpaceX prepares to enter major indexes, wealth managers say clients are increasingly asking how to avoid owning the company because of Elon Musk's polarizing reputation.  Ellevest head of wealth management Emily Green joined Open Interest to discuss the  real cost of excluding stocks from index portfolios, why direct indexing is gaining traction, and what passive investors may not realize about changing index dynamics. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX’s Biggest Bull Sees Valuation Soaring Above $10 Trillion
title_cn: SpaceX最大看涨者认为估值飙升至10万亿美元以上
summary: SpaceX has no shortage of fans on Wall Street, but one analyst stands out among the rest as by far the most bullish: Raymond James’ Brian Gesuale.

title: MIdtown Manhattan Buildings Evacuated After Officials Warn of Collapse
title_cn: 官员警告曼哈顿中城建筑物倒塌后疏散
summary: Construction crews were pulled from a Midtown Manhattan building after bricks were reported falling from the 21st floor, prompting building evacuations and street closures. (Video courtesy of WABC) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Consumers’ Inflation Expectations Rose in June, NY Fed Survey Says
title_cn: 纽约联储调查显示美国消费者 6 月份通胀预期上升
summary: Americans’ expectations for inflation over the near and medium term rose in June amid strong increases anticipated for medical care costs and rent, according to a Federal Reserve Bank of New York survey released Tuesday.

title: SpaceX Joins Nasdaq 100; Crinetics Pharmaceuticals Soars on Buyout | Stock Movers
title_cn: SpaceX 跻身纳斯达克 100 指数； Crinetics Pharmaceuticals 因收购而飙升 |库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers:

- Fiserv (FISV) is climbing as the Wall Street Journal reports big banks including JPMorgan Chase, Bank of America, Wells Fargo and PNC Financial Services Group have held preliminary discussions about a deal to acquire a network owned by the financial-technology company Fiserv.
- Crinetics Pharmaceuticals (CRNC) is soaring after Vertex Pharmaceuticals agreed to buy Crinetics for $10 billion in cash to expand into endocrinology.
- SpaceX (SPCX) is lower even though at least six brokers, including Morgan Stanley and Goldman Sachs, have started coverage of SpaceX with buy-equivalent ratings. SpaceX’s addition to the Nasdaq 100 should provide considerable support to the stock, considering the number of funds that track the tech-heavy benchmark. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tech Rout Deepens on Samsung Earnings; SpaceX Gets Bullish Calls
title_cn: 三星财报导致科技股进一步溃败； SpaceX 受到看好
summary: US technology shares extended declines on Tuesday after earnings from Samsung Electronics Co. failed to satisfy investors, spurring worries over the durability of this year’s red-hot artificial intelligence trade.

title: China Buys More US Soybeans as Key Agricultural Trade Ramps Up
title_cn: 随着主要农产品贸易的增加，中国购买更多美国大豆
summary: China has purchased more soybeans from the US, according to people familiar with the matter, as the key agricultural trade gains momentum following a summit between the leaders of the two nations in May.

title: China Regulator Keeps Close Eye on Susquehanna Case
title_cn: 中国监管机构密切关注萨斯奎哈纳案
summary: China’s securities watchdog said it is paying close attention to a legal case brought by Susquehanna International Group against alleged insider traders, after the US market maker said regulatory officials may have been involved in the trades.

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 7/7/2026
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Rises as Latest Ship Attacks Highlight Hormuz Crossing Risks
title_cn: 最新船舶袭击事件凸显穿越霍尔木兹海峡的风险，油价上涨
summary: Oil nudged higher following attacks on shipping in and around the Strait of Hormuz, pointing to continued risks to vessels in the critical waterway.

title: Germany Must Stabilize Debt in Long Run to Keep AAA, Scope Says
title_cn: Scope表示，从长远来看，德国必须稳定债务以保持AAA级
summary: Germany’s debt mountain will need to stop growing in the long term if the country is to retain its top credit grade, according to Scope Ratings.

title: Abu Dhabi Ruler’s Family Office Is a Global Dealmaking Force
title_cn: 阿布扎比统治者的家族办公室是一支全球交易撮合力量
summary: Its name is rarely spoken in public, but the family office of Abu Dhabi's ruler is a global force with a huge appetite for deals. Ben Stupples explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon Fuels AI Debt Boom With Bond Sale of at Least $25 Billion
title_cn: 亚马逊出售至少 250 亿美元债券，推动人工智能债务热潮
summary: Amazon.com Inc. is looking to raise at least $25 billion from a US dollar bond sale, marking its latest jumbo debt offering as the tech giant ramps up spending on artificial intelligence infrastructure.

title: Italy Seeks $6 Billion in First Dollar-Bond Sale Since 2021
title_cn: 意大利寻求自 2021 年以来首次发行 60 亿美元美元债券
summary: Italy is returning to the US dollar bond market for the first time since the pandemic, broadening its pool of foreign investors after the country’s improving finances won credit-rating upgrades.

title: Three New ETFs to Watch
title_cn: 值得关注的三只新 ETF
summary: The SpaceX IPO set off a predictable frenzy—we look at who may lead the pack. Also, betting against AI, high-yield bonds, plus bonus mentions.

title: A Once-Great Copper Miner Faces a Reckoning Just as AI Power Demand Soars
title_cn: 随着人工智能电力需求飙升，曾经伟大的铜矿商面临清算
summary: Chile’s Codelco, facing scrutiny for a fatal accident and inflated production figures, is struggling under $25 billion of debt.

title: Gold Fluctuates as Traders Weigh Fed Rate Path, Hormuz Attacks
title_cn: 随着交易员权衡美联储利率走势和霍尔木兹袭击，黄金波动
summary: Gold swung between gains and losses as traders weighed the outlook for US interest rates and renewed attacks on shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Angola Seeks to Raise About $320 Million in Nation’s Biggest IPO
title_cn: 安哥拉寻求通过该国最大规模的IPO筹集约3.2亿美元
summary: Angola plans to raise as much as $320 million selling shares in Unitel SA, the country’s biggest telecommunications operator, to help finance its budget and deepen the oil-rich nation’s capital markets.

title: Abu Dhabi Royal Family Firm to Invest $1.13 Billion in LNG Company MidOcean
title_cn: 阿布扎比王室公司将向液化天然气公司 MidOcean 投资 11.3 亿美元
summary: An investment firm owned by members of Abu Dhabi’s ruling family will invest $1.13 billion in liquefied natural gas company MidOcean Energy LLC.

title: Colombia’s Incoming Leader Orders Boycott of Transition Process
title_cn: 哥伦比亚新​​任领导人下令抵制过渡进程
summary: Colombian president-elect Abelardo de la Espriella said he’s suspending transition meetings with the outgoing government, as tensions escalate ahead of the Aug. 7 handover.

title: Apollo’s Slok Says S&P 493’s Stalled Margins Are a Big-Tech Risk
title_cn: Apollo 的 Slok 表示 S&P 493 的利润率停滞不前是科技股的一大风险
summary: Apollo Global Management Inc.’s Torsten Slok warned that companies outside the giants of the technology sector are failing to show gains in profitability from their spending on artificial intelligence, posing risks to Big Tech valuations.

title: Tech Volatility Hits Highest Since Dot-Com Bust Next to S&P 500
title_cn: 科技股波动率创互联网泡沫破灭以来最高，仅次于标准普尔 500 指数
summary: The higher the rally in technology high-flyers, the louder the anxiety around a new wave of turbulence in the group.

title: AI Fuels Record M&A Boom
title_cn: 人工智能推动创纪录的并购热潮
summary: Record M&A volumes are being driven by AI, abundant capital, and a more deal-friendly regulatory environment, but Jones Day's Robert Profusek says private equity is still on the sidelines because sellers' expectations remain too high. He also warns that AI valuations are reaching unprecedented levels, raising questions about whether today's deal boom can last. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Solstice Buys Element Solutions
title_cn: Solstice 收购 Element Solutions
summary: Element Solutions CEO Ben Gliklich joins Open Interest to break down why Solstice’s $14.5 billion takeover offer was too compelling to pass up, explaining how the combined company could become a bigger player in semiconductor materials, AI data-center cooling and critical US  supply chains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chip Stocks Tumble on AI Anxiety as Oil Climbs
title_cn: 随着油价上涨，芯片股因人工智能焦虑而暴跌
summary:
A selloff in chipmakers dragged down stocks on concerns over whether massive artificial-intelligence investments will justify lofty valuations.
Julian Emanuel, Chief Equity & Quantitative Strategist at Evercore ISI, discusses his S&P 500 call amid recent volatility. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Treasuries Fall Before Auction as Oil Rebounds, Amazon to Borrow
title_cn: 由于石油反弹，亚马逊借钱，国债在拍卖前下跌
summary: Treasuries fell as oil prices climbed on signs of renewed threats to Middle East supply and as Amazon.com slated a corporate bond offering expected to raise at least $25 billion.

title: Elon Musk's SpaceX to Join the Nasdaq 100 Index
title_cn: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 SpaceX 将加入纳斯达克 100 指数
summary:
SpaceX joins the Nasdaq 100 Index Tuesday and many analysts are saying buy the stock. But Nicholas Owens of Morningstar has a sell rating and price target of $62. He says shares are overvalued. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance."
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon Seeks to Raise at Least $25 Billion to Fund AI Spending
title_cn: 亚马逊寻求筹集至少 250 亿美元来资助人工智能支出
summary: Amazon.com is looking to raise at least $25 billion from a US dollar bond sale, its latest funding push as the company ramps up investment in AI infrastructure. Robert Schiffman and Ed Ludlow have more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wall Street Unleashes Bullish SpaceX Ratings Eyeing 47% Upside
title_cn: 华尔街释放乐观情绪 SpaceX 评级有望上涨 47%
summary: Wall Street’s biggest banks shopped SpaceX shares for $135 a pop during its record initial public offering. Just weeks later, sell-side analysts from many of those same banks are telling clients those shares should be worth $236 each on average.

title: Slok Says Profit Margins Outside Mag 7 Need to Rise
title_cn: Slok 表示 Mag 7 以外的利润率需要提高
summary: Apollo Global Management Inc.’s Torsten Slok says Big Tech valuations are at risk. “We need to see profit margins go up outside the Magnificent 7,” Slok, Apollo’s chief economist, said Tuesday on Bloomberg Television’s Surveillance, using the shorthand term for the US tech titans. “In other words, what’s going on with the S&P 493 becomes very, very critical.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Supplier Luxshare Prices $3.1 Billion HK Listing at Top
title_cn: 苹果供应商立讯精密定价31亿美元 在香港上市
summary: Apple Inc. supplier Luxshare Precision Industry Co. raised HK$24.3 billion ($3.1 billion) after pricing shares for its Hong Kong listing at the maximum amount it had set.

title: Geothermal Startup Raises $134 Million for Drilling Superhot Rocks
title_cn: 地热初创公司融资 1.34 亿美元用于钻探超热岩石
summary: Geothermal startup Quaise Energy raised $134 million to develop technology for drilling superhot rocks.

title: Evercore's Emanuel Doesn't See Federal Reserve Moving on Rates This Year
title_cn: Evercore 的伊曼纽尔认为美联储今年不会调整利率
summary: Julian Emanuel, Evercore ISI chief equity and quantitative strategist, doesn't believe the Federal Reserve will move on interest rates this year. Emanuel is maintaining his S&P 500 year-end price target of 7,750 even though stocks have become more volatile. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Legal Startup Norm Valued at $1.2 Billion in Funding Round
title_cn: AI合法初创公司Norm融资轮估值达12亿美元
summary: Norm Ai has raised $120 million from investors in a new funding round to help automate legal services and rethink how the industry bills for its work.

title: Chinese AI Startup DeepSeek Developing Own AI Chip, Report Says
title_cn: 报告称中国人工智能初创公司 DeepSeek 正在开发自己的人工智能芯片
summary: China’s DeepSeek is developing its own chip to help power artificial intelligence systems, Reuters reported, citing unnamed sources.

title: VC Money Doubles In Defense Tech as the Next Big Bet
title_cn: 国防科技领域的风险投资资金翻倍，成为下一个大赌注
summary: Startups focused on aerospace and the military are no longer off limits for Silicon Valley

title: SAP’s Senior Reshuffle Follows AI-Induced Stock Rout
title_cn: 人工智能引发股价暴跌后 SAP 进行高管重组
summary: The SaaSpocalypse might as well have been called the SAPocalypse.

title: Ex-Tesla Scientist Unveils Plans For European Humanoid Robot
title_cn: 前特斯拉科学家公布欧洲人形机器人计划
summary: A former Tesla Inc. scientist who worked on Elon Musk’s Optimus robot unveiled plans to produce a lightweight humanoid robot for manufacturing plants, logistics warehouses and homes.

title: AI Productivity Gains Are Years Away, Deutsche Bank’s Reid Says
title_cn: 德意志银行的里德表示，人工智能生产力的提高还需要数年时间
summary: Artificial intelligence is likely to enhance productivity significantly but any such impact on economies may still be years away, Deutsche Bank analyst Jim Reid said.

title: WEF Founder Schwab Claims He Found Spying Device at His Home
title_cn: WEF创始人施瓦布声称他在家中发现了间谍设备
summary: World Economic Forum founder Klaus Schwab has filed a criminal complaint following the alleged discovery of a secret listening device planted in his home office in Geneva.

title: Renewables Hit Record Share of India Power Mix as Coal Flatlines
title_cn: 可再生能源在印度电力结构中的份额创下历史新高，而煤炭则趋于平淡
summary: The share of renewable energy in India’s electricity mix rose to a record high this summer, highlighting the increasing importance of solar and wind in the world’s third-largest emitter.

title: Extreme SK Hynix Stock Swings Add Wild Card to $28 Billion Deal
title_cn: SK 海力士股价大幅波动为 280 亿美元交易增添了不确定性
summary: SK Hynix Inc.’s New York listing, currently on track to be the largest ever by a foreign company in the US, is facing an unusual source of uncertainty for a major offering: the wildest swings seen in global chip stocks in years.

title: ECB Asks Banks for Plans to Address AI Cybersecurity Threats
title_cn: 欧洲央行要求银行提供应对人工智能网络安全威胁的计划
summary: Europe’s banking regulator asked banks to come up with plans to address the growing threat from frontier artificial intelligence models such as Anthropic PBC’s Claude Mythos to cybersecurity.

title: Samsung’s Record Profit Fails to Impress After AI Chip Rally
title_cn: AI芯片上涨后，三星创纪录的利润未能给人留下深刻印象
summary: Samsung Electronics Co.’s quarterly profit surged 19-fold, an increase that still wasn’t enough for investors whose expectations for continued AI-fueled growth had driven the stock up more than 150% this year.

title: India Objection to WhatsApp Username Switch Gets Somalia Backing
title_cn: 印度反对 WhatsApp 用户名变更得到索马里支持
summary: Somalia joined India in objecting to Meta Platforms Inc.’s planned WhatsApp username feature, citing security concerns in a country that’s been battling Islamist militants for two decades.

title: Nuveen's Cooper Sees Rotation Back Into Hyperscalers
title_cn: Nuveen 的 Cooper 预计将回归超大规模
summary: Laura Cooper, global investment strategist and macro credit head at Nuveen, discusses the outlook for equity markets and why she sees the potential for a rotation back into hyperscalers. "Valuations have come off, we're now seeing revenue growth have a slight upturn going forward, and we've seen several weeks of consecutive outflows," Cooper tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BAE-Backed Venture Capital Firm Expeditions Raises €197 Million Fund for European Defense Startups
title_cn: BAE 支持的风险投资公司 Expeditions 为欧洲国防初创公司筹集 1.97 亿欧元资金
summary: A defense-tech venture capital firm backed by BAE Systems and the NATO Innovation Fund has raised a €197 million ($225 million) fund to help develop sovereign military technologies in Europe.

title: Cuba Blames US as It Tries to Restore Power After Blackout
title_cn: 古巴在停电后试图恢复供电，指责美国
summary: A US energy blockade is hampering Cuba’s attempts to restore electricity almost 24 hours after a nationwide blackout hit the communist-run island, officials said.

title: Iran Tells UN It Has Right to Control ‘Parts’ of Hormuz Strait
title_cn: 伊朗告诉联合国它有权控制霍尔木兹海峡的“部分”
summary: Iran told the United Nations’ shipping agency that it has authority over parts of the Strait of Hormuz, the waterway that’s a centerpiece of peace talks between Washington and Tehran.

title: Lawsuit Accuses US of Giving Secret Data to Iran on Asylum Seekers
title_cn: 诉讼指控美国向伊朗提供有关寻求庇护者的秘密数据
summary: A lawsuit claims the Trump administration is unlawfully giving confidential personal information to Iran about Iranians who applied for asylum to avoid “grave danger” in their native country.

title: IOC Provisionally Lifts Suspension of Russian Olympic Committee
title_cn: 国际奥委会暂时解除俄罗斯奥委会的停职
summary: The International Olympic Committee provisionally lifted the suspension of the Russian Olympic Committee, saying as the qualification period of the 2028 Los Angeles Games had started all athletes needed to be offered equal access to the competition.

title: Trump Says US May Sell Turkey F-35s, Pushes to Lift Sanctions
title_cn: 特朗普表示美国可能向土耳其出售F-35，推动解除制裁
summary:
President Donald Trump gave another strong indication that he may soon try to reverse his own ban on Turkey buying F-35 fighter jets from the US, vowing to lift sanctions on the country. “It’s a decision we’re going to make,” Trump said Tuesday, sitting alongside Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan before a meeting on the sidelines of the NATO summit in Ankara. “Certainly something we will consider.”

Trump said he wanted to erase sanctions on Turkey linked to its acquisition of a Russian air defense system, which spurred the president to bar the country from getting F-35s in the first place. Such a step would face pushback in the US and may even violate the law itself, which Trump signed. The warming ties between Trump and Erdogan is playing out against the backdrop of a NATO summit more dominated by a fraying transatlantic relationship. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Le Pen Cleared to Run in 2027 French Presidential Election
title_cn: 勒庞获准参加 2027 年法国总统选举
summary: Marine Le Pen was cleared to enter the 2027 French presidential race after appeal judges shortened her election ban, yet upheld her conviction for embezzling European Union funds. Caroline Connan explains what happens next (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hungary Suspends State Media, Apologizing for Orban-Era ‘Lies’
title_cn: 匈牙利暂停官方媒体，为欧尔班时代的“谎言”道歉
summary: Hungary’s state media went dark after its new leadership said it was ending years of propaganda that had propped up former leader Viktor Orban until his downfall in watershed elections earlier this year.

title: Democrats Probe Cantor Fitzgerald Ties in USA Rare Earth Deal
title_cn: 民主党调查坎托·菲茨杰拉德与美国稀土交易的关系
summary: Democratic lawmakers are investigating whether a $1.6 billion deal involving critical minerals company USA Rare Earth Inc. created a conflict of interest by benefiting Cantor Fitzgerald, the financial services firm formerly led by Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick.

title: EU's Role Is to 'Strengthen' Ukraine, Kallas Says
title_cn: 卡拉斯表示，欧盟的作用是“加强”乌克兰
summary: Kaja Kallas, the European Union's foreign affairs chief, says the EU's role is to "strengthen" Ukraine. Speaking on Bloomberg Television from the 2026 NATO Summit in Ankara, Kallas adds that US troop movements in Europe do not affect the overall capability of defense and deterrence in the continent. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Barrett, Kagan to Attend Supreme Court Budget Hearings
title_cn: 巴雷特和卡根将出席最高法院预算听证会
summary: Justices Amy Coney Barrett and Elena Kagan will testify before House and Senate lawmakers on the Supreme Court’s budget request.

title: Russia Strike Exposes Ukraine Air Defense Gap as NATO Summit Begins
title_cn: 北约峰会开幕之际，俄罗斯的空袭暴露了乌克兰的防空差距
summary:
A deadly attack on the eve of the NATO summit highlighted Kyiv’s growing vulnerability as shortages of US-made Patriot air defenses become acute and peace talks remain stalled.
Rose Gottemoeller, former deputy secretary-general of NATO and former U.S. Under Secretary of State for Arms Control and International Security, discusses the NATO Summit and possible outcomes as leaders engage in defense talks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Zimbabwean President Signs Law Extending His Term by Two Years
title_cn: 津巴布韦总统签署法律将任期延长两年
summary: Zimbabwe’s president signed into law a constitutional amendment that will extend the 83-year-old leader’s rule of the southern African nation by two years.

title: Rachel Reeves to Attend Brussels Dinner With EU Peers on Energy
title_cn: 雷切尔·里夫斯将出席布鲁塞尔与欧盟同行就能源问题举行的晚宴
summary: UK chancellor Rachel Reeves will join European Union finance ministers on Thursday in Brussels to discuss energy and economic security matters.

title: Farage Quits as MP to Seek New Mandate Amid Probe Into Gifts
title_cn: 法拉奇辞去国会议员职务，在礼物调查中寻求新的授权
summary: Reform UK leader Nigel Farage quit as a Member of Parliament and said he would fight for a new mandate in the resulting special election following a growing backlash over undeclared gifts.

title: Trump Arrives in Ankara for NATO Summit
title_cn: 特朗普抵达安卡拉出席北约峰会
summary: US President Donald Trump was welcomed with pomp and pageantry at the Turkish Presidential Palace, where he met President Recep Tayyip Erdogan. Trump is in the capital city for the 2026 NATO Summit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Finland’s Stubb Calls for More Patriot Missiles for Ukraine
title_cn: 芬兰总统斯塔布呼吁为乌克兰提供更多爱国者导弹
summary: Finnish President Alexander Stubb called on his fellow NATO leaders to work on providing Ukraine with the means of defending itself against waves of missile strikes by Russia.

title: Qatar LNG Ship Hit, Saudi Tanker Damaged in Strait of Hormuz
title_cn: 卡塔尔液化天然气船在霍尔木兹海峡被击中，沙特油轮受损
summary: A Qatari liquefied natural gas carrier was hit and a laden Saudi oil tanker suffered damage as they exited the Strait of Hormuz, heightening unease among shipowners and testing a US-Iran agreement to halt attacks.

title: Trump Can See Ukraine Has Upper Hand, Stubb Says
title_cn: 斯塔布表示，特朗普可以看到乌克兰占据上风
summary: US President Donald Trump, right, walks with Recep Tayyip Erdogan after arriving in Ankara, on July 7. Photographer: Alex Brandon/AP Photo

title: Le Pen Cleared by Court to Run in 2027 French Presidential Election
title_cn: 法院批准勒庞参加 2027 年法国总统选举
summary: Marine Le Pen was cleared to enter the 2027 French presidential race after appeal judges shortened her election ban, yet upheld her conviction for embezzling European Union funds.

title: Farage Quits as MP Vowing To Contest By-Election
title_cn: 法拉奇辞去议员职务并发誓参加补选
summary:
Nigel Farage has quit as an MP — vowing to fight the resulting by-election in Clacton.

The shock announcement comes after increasing scrutiny over undeclared gifts the Reform UK leader received in the run-up to the 2024 general election. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Finland's Stubb Says Ukraine Needs More Patriot Missiles
title_cn: 芬兰斯塔布称乌克兰需要更多爱国者导弹
summary: Finland’s President Alexander Stubb says Europe and the US need to work on providing missiles for Ukraine, and that letting the nation make Patriots would be cost-effective. "We're seeing over 100 civilian buildings being hit just the other night with civilians dying," Stubb tells Bloomberg's Annmarie Hordern at the NATO summit in Ankara, Turkey. "So this is something that we, Europeans and Americans, need to work on.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Greenland Should Be Controlled by the US
title_cn: 特朗普称格陵兰岛应由美国控制
summary: President Donald Trump says Greenland "should be controlled by the United States." He speaks at the Turkish presidential compound alongside President Recep Tayyip Erdogan in Ankara, where he is attending the 2026 NATO Summit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says US May Sell Turkey F-35s and Pushes to Lift Sanctions
title_cn: 特朗普称美国可能向土耳其出售F-35并推动解除制裁
summary: President Donald Trump gave another strong indication that he may soon try to reverse his own ban on Turkey buying F-35 fighter jets from the US, vowing to lift sanctions on the country.

title: NATO Agrees to $50 Billion in Defense Deals to Placate Trump
title_cn: 北约同意签署 500 亿美元防务协议安抚特朗普
summary: NATO allies have agreed to at least $50 billion in defense industry deals, according to an alliance official, to show to US President Donald Trump that Europe is heeding his spending demands.

title: China’s ICBM Tests Point to New Normal Rattling the Pacific
title_cn: 中国的洲际弹道导弹试验预示着太平洋地区的新常态
summary: China’s test this week of a submarine-fired ballistic missile may mark the beginning of more regular Pacific launches as the country advances its arsenal for delivering nuclear warheads, unsettling governments already wary of Beijing’s military buildup.

title: Trump Says He'll Consider Selling F-35s to Turkey
title_cn: 特朗普称他将考虑向土耳其出售F-35
summary: President Donald Trump says the US would "certainly" consider allowing Turkey to the F-35 fighter jet program, adding that the nations has been more "loyal" than many other countries. Trump speaks during a press conference alongside Turkish President Erdogan in Ankara, where he is attending the 2026 NATO Summit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Africa Prepares for Ebola Risk as Congo Outbreak Spreads
title_cn: 随着刚果疫情蔓延，南非为应对埃博拉风险做好准备
summary: South Africa is preparing for a possible Ebola outbreak as the virus continues to spread in the Democratic Republic of Congo, underscoring concerns that the continent’s busiest travel hubs may eventually import cases.

title: Farage Says He's Forcing By-Election in His Constituency
title_cn: 法拉奇称他正在强制选区进行补选
summary: Reform UK leader Nigel Farage announces his intention to resign as a Member of Parliament, therefore forcing a by-election in his Clacton constituency — a vote in which he will stand. The announcement comes as the right wing leader faces increasing scrutiny over undeclared gifts he received in the run-up to the 2024 general election. "I've decided that the people of Clacton should be the judges of my actions," Farage says.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says 'We Don't Want to Sanction Friends'
title_cn: 特朗普表示“我们不想制裁朋友”
summary: US President Trump says the US will be removing Turkey’s Countering America’s Adversaries Through Sanctions Act sanctions, during remarks to reporters at a bilateral meeting with his Turkish counterpart Recep Tayyip Erdogan. Trump is in Ankara for the 2026 NATO Summit. (Source: Bloomberg)
